patch.value: Track the July 6, 2026 fleet pass: align package metadata with latest pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog, verify daily release automation, run build/test/audit/package checks with real workspace data where practical, inspect GitHub state, and record privacy/history findings without changing pm-cli itself.
July 6, 2026 fleet readiness pass for the pm package ecosystem.
Package uses current pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog; release/check scripts pass; pm items capture decisions; no tracked secrets/private data are introduced; GitHub PR/release state is reviewed.

author: codex-reporting
message: Continue package-specific production-readiness pass under reporting/output fleet ownership

author: codex-reporting

patch.value: Inventory GitHub reports and existing PR; validate all commands and documented output modes with real PM data; build/typecheck/test/pack/install/activate; inspect tarball; audit tracked files and full history; verify daily change-gated npm+Bun+GitHub release using pm-changelog; run Greptile; close all bot feedback and checks; merge and return main.
Current SDK/changelog dependencies, production-grade command UX, exhaustive real-workspace evidence, privacy-safe package/history, and a fully reviewed green merged PR.
This package produces agent-facing project context; correctness, compactness, privacy, and release integrity are required before public distribution.

value.author: codex-reporting
value.text: 2026-07-09 codex-reporting resumed the existing nonduplicate readiness item. Unrelated local work is preserved; external Slack delivery will use only a local mock webhook.

value.author: codex-reporting
value.text: Evidence will be appended as each dependency, command, artifact, security/history, Greptile, CI, review, and merge gate completes.

message: Resume readiness item with explicit evidence gates

value.author: context-specialist
value.text: 2026-07-10 context-specialist: Fixed release.yml publish step (added 3-attempt provenance retry+fallback matching fleet standard). Updated peerDep to >=2026.7.10, manifest compat to >=2026.7.10. Untracked dist/ from git, standardized .gitignore. typecheck+build+test(50 pass)+pack(21.1KB)+changelog all green. npm@2026.7.10 published, CI+release green. No secrets in history.

value.author: context-specialist
value.text: Decision: Previous agent's work (section validation, depth-sorted neighbors, optimized deps computation, empty-deps rendering) is production-ready. Reinstalled extension from current source to fix stale installed copy.

value.author: context-specialist
value.text: Upstream pm CLI UX bug: repeated --section/--id flags don't accumulate; only last value kept. Use comma-separated values as workaround. Installed extension copies in .agents/pm/extensions/ can become stale; reinstall with 'pm install . --project' after source changes.

value.note: hardened publish step with 3-attempt provenance retry
